steps.t: Morlad can be found to the south and slightly west of the Paths of the Dead in Blackroot Vale. Ludhír has asked you to travel to Morlad, the chief set…
Malthellam can be found in Morlad, to the south-west of the Paths of the Dead. Ludhír has asked that you meet with Malthellam, the steward of the Vale…
